mapper.sql: note_id, author_id, title_snapshot, content_preview_snapshot, cover_url_snapshot, visibility, note_status, item_status, published_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bluenote_feed.feed_note_index ( note_id, author_id, title_snapshot, content_preview_snapshot, cover_url_snapshot, visibility, note_status, item_status, published_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{noteId}, #{authorId}, #{titleSnapshot}, #{contentPreviewSnapshot}, #{coverUrlSnapshot}, #{visibility}, #{noteStatus}, #{itemStatus}, #{publishedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE author_id = VALUES(author_id), title_snapshot = VALUES(title_snapshot), content_preview_snapshot = VALUES(content_preview_snapshot), cover_url_snapshot = VALUES(cover_url_snapshot), visibility = VALUES(visibility), note_status = VALUES(note_status), item_status = VALUES(item_status), published_at = VALUES(published_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM bluenote_feed.feed_note_index WHERE note_id IN
#{noteId}

SELECT FROM bluenote_feed.feed_note_index WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND item_status = 'VISIBLE' AND visibility = 'PUBLIC' AND note_status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY published_at DESC, note_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
